questions.question:
Overlaying



Operating System: ISRO CSE 2008 | Question: 60
options: allows larger programs, but requires more effort

questions.question:
Which of the following multithreading model is followed in Linux OS?



Operating System: ISRO CSE 2023 | Question: 11
options: One User Thread mapping to One Kernel Thread
Many User Threads mapping to One Kernel Thread
One User Thread mapping to Many Kernel Threads
Many User Threads mapping to Many Kernel Threads
questions.correct_answer: One User Thread mapping to One Kernel Thread

questions.question:
Purpose of priority inheritance protocol in synchronization mechanisms is



Operating System: ISRO CSE 2023 | Question: 12
options: To prevent priority inversion in systems having two or lesser priorities for a resource
To provide mutual exclusion between threads and prevent data corruption
To prevent priority inversion and ensure fairness in resource allocation
To allow multiple threads to access any resource simultaneously
questions.correct_answer: To prevent priority inversion and ensure fairness in resource allocation
